message.content:
Review the InvoiceCashbackPoints migration to verify no logic was changed.

CRITICAL RULE: Migration should ONLY change structure (Redux → Zustand), NOT behavior.

Check the following logic remains identical:
1. useEffect calls requestParameterization on mount
2. conversionFactor comes from route.params
3. pointsPrice calculation: Math.trunc(points || 0) * conversionFactor
4. convertionPrice calculation: pointsQuantity * conversionFactor
5. handleChangePoints validation: val > Math.trunc(Number(points))
6. handleUseAll: uses points from state
7. invoiceList uses pointsQuantity in the description

Original behavior:
- Component receives pointsReducer from Redux
- Uses pointsReducer.points for balance
- Uses pointsReducer.pointsQuantity for conversion rate
- Uses pointsReducer?.isLoadingParameterization for loading state

New behavior (should be identical):
- Component uses usePoints() hook
- Uses points for balance
- Uses pointsQuantity for conversion rate  
- Uses isLoadingParameterization for loading state

Verify EXACT behavior preservation. PASS/FAIL verdict.

content.text: I'll review the InvoiceCashbackPoints migration to verify no logic was changed. Let me start by examining the original Redux version and the new Zustand version.
Let me search for the component more broadly:

content.content:
1→# Reward Program - Redux to Zustand Migration
     2→
     3→Last Updated: 2026-01-26 22:55
     4→Status: INCOMPLETE - SCREEN MIGRATION IN PROGRESS (4/6 screens migrated)
     5→
     6→================================================================================
     7→CRITICAL: PREVIOUS SESSION ERRORS TO AVOID
     8→================================================================================
     9→
    10→1. INFRASTRUCTURE WAS CREATED BUT SCREENS WERE NOT MIGRATED
    11→   - Zustand stores exist but screens still use Redux connect()
    12→   - useRescue hook was created but NEVER integrated into screens
    13→   - This made the migration USELESS - data flows through Redux, not Zustand
    14→
    15→2. TYPES WERE DUPLICATED UNNECESSARILY
    16→   - PointsProduct already exists in services/models/products.model.ts
    17→   - Do NOT add duplicate types - check if they exist first
    18→
    19→3. BALANCE LOCATION WAS CONFUSED
    20→   - Balance is in `pointsBalance` within extract.store.ts
    21→   - NOT in parameter.store.ts
    22→   - The getPointsBalance() service exists in extract.service.ts
    23→
    24→4. PRODUCTION PATTERN WAS NOT FOLLOWED
    25→   - Production (card-place) calls services DIRECTLY, not always through hooks
    26→   - Example: getParameterPointsProgram() is called directly in Points screen
    27→
    28→5. usePermission USES SuperApp's Redux (customerReducer.nrc)
    29→   - This is NOT local Redux to migrate
    30→   - Production also uses useSelector for this
    31→   - Keep as-is until SuperApp migrates customer data to Zustand
    32→
    33→================================================================================
    34→CURRENT STATE (VERIFIED 2026-01-26)
    35→================================================================================
    36→
    37→## Zustand Infrastructure: COMPLETE
    38→
    39→| Domain       | Store | API | Model | Repository | Service | Hook   |
    40→|--------------|-------|-----|-------|------------|---------|--------|
    41→| airlineMiles | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | -          | ✅      | ✅     |
    42→| extract      | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | -      |
    43→| parameter    | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | -      |
    44→| permission   | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | ✅     |
    45→| products     | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | -      |
    46→| rescue       | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | -          | ✅      | ✅ (1) |
    47→| marketplace  | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | -          | ✅      | -      |
    48→
    49→(1) useRescue exists but is NEVER USED by any screen
    50→
    51→## Hooks Status:
    52→- src/services/hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts - ✅ Used by AirlineMilesMarketplace
    53→- src/services/hooks/usePermission.ts - ✅ Used by InvoiceCashbackSummary
    54→- src/services/hooks/useRescue.ts - ❌ EXISTS BUT UNUSED
    55→- src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts - ✅ USED by Points screen
    56→- src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts - ✅ CREATED (Phase 3 completed)
    57→
    58→## Screens Status:
    59→
    60→| Screen                    | Uses Redux? | Uses Zustand? | Migration Status |
    61→|---------------------------|-------------|---------------|------------------|
    62→| AirlineMilesMarketplace   | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
    63→| ExtractRewardProgram      | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
    64→| LearnMoreRewardProgram    | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
    65→| MyOrdersRewardProgram     | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
    66→| Points                    | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
    67→| PointsDetail              | No          | N/A           | ✅ DONE          |
    68→| RewardProgramMarketplace  | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
    69→| InvoiceCashbackOnboarding | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
    70→| InvoiceCashbackPoints     | YES         | No            | ❌ PENDING       |
    71→| InvoiceCashbackSummary    | YES         | Partial (4)   | ❌ PENDING       |
    72→
    73→(2) Points uses usePoints hook (migrated 2026-01-26)
    74→(3) PointsDetail - dead Redux code removed (2026-01-26)
    75→(4) InvoiceCashbackSummary uses usePermission (Zustand) but rescueActions (Redux)
    76→
    77→## Redux Files That MUST BE DELETED (after screen migration):
    78→
    79→- src/redux/ducks/points.ts
    80→- src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
    81→- src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
    82→- src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
    83→- src/redux/reducers/index.ts
    84→- src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts (only contains ParametrizationData type)
    85→
    86→## Missing Types in Zustand Models:
    87→
    88→- FilterOption - ✅ MIGRATED to services/models/products.model.ts (Phase 1 completed)
    89→
    90→================================================================================
    91→STATE MAPPING: Redux → Zustand
    92→================================================================================
    93→
    94→## pointsReducer (Redux) → Multiple Zustand stores
    95→
    96→| Redux Field                    | Zustand Location                              | Service Function           |
    97→|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------------------|
    98→| points                         | pointsBalance.points (extract store)          | getPointsBalance()         |
    99→| isLoadingBalance               | pointsBalance.status === LOADING              | -                          |
   100→| isErrorBalance                 | pointsBalance.status === ERROR                | -                          |
   101→| products                       | pointsProducts.products (products store)      | getPointsProducts()        |
   102→| isLoadingProducts              | pointsProducts.status === LOADING             | -                          |
   103→| isErrorProducts                | pointsProducts.status === ERROR               | -                          |
   104→| pointsQuantity                 | parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity         | getParameterPointsProgram()|
   105→| conversionFactor               | parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor       | -                          |
   106→| isLoadingParameterization      | parameterPointsProgram.status === LOADING     | -                          |
   107→| isErrorParameterization        | parameterPointsProgram.status === ERROR       | -                          |
   108→| appliedTransactionsFilters     | pointsExtractFilters.appliedTransactionsFilters | -                        |
   109→| appliedExpiringFilters         | pointsExtractFilters.appliedExpiringFilters   | -                          |
   110→
   111→## rescueReducer (Redux) → rescue store (Zustand)
   112→
   113→| Redux Field | Zustand Location            | Service Function |
   114→|-------------|-----------------------------|------------------|
   115→| isLoading   | rescue.status === LOADING   | performRescue()  |
   116→| isError     | rescue.status === ERROR     | -                |
   117→| status      | rescue.responseStatus       | -                |
   118→
   119→## getMarketplaceReducer (Redux) → marketplace store (Zustand)
   120→
   121→| Redux Field | Zustand Location              | Service Function  |
   122→|-------------|-------------------------------|-------------------|
   123→| isLoading   | marketplace.status === LOADING| getMarketplace()  |
   124→| isError     | marketplace.status === ERROR  | -                 |
   125→| data        | marketplace.data              | -                 |
   126→
   127→================================================================================
   128→TASKS TO COMPLETE MIGRATION
   129→================================================================================
   130→
   131→## Phase 1: Add Missing Type [QUICK FIX] ✅ COMPLETED
   132→
   133→### 1.1 Add FilterOption to products.model.ts ✅ DONE
   134→File: src/services/models/products.model.ts
   135→FilterOption interface added at end of file.
   136→
   137→### 1.2 Export FilterOption from models/index.ts ✅ DONE
   138→File: src/services/models/index.ts
   139→Already exported via wildcard: `export * from './products.model'`
   140→
   141→--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   142→
   143→## Phase 2: Create usePoints Hook [CRITICAL] ✅ COMPLETED
   144→
   145→### 2.1 Create src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts ✅ DONE
   146→File created at src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts with all required functionality.
   147→
   148→### 2.2 Export from hooks/index.ts ✅ DONE
   149→Added: `export * from './usePoints';`
   150→
   151→This hook REPLACES all pointsReducer + PointsActions usage.
   152→
   153→```typescript
   154→import { useCallback } from 'react';
   155→import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
   156→import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
   157→import {
   158→  getPointsProducts,
   159→  clearPointsProducts,
   160→  getPointsBalance,
   161→  getParameterPointsProgram,
   162→} from '../services';
   163→import {
   164→  PointsProductsStatus,
   165→  PointsBalanceStatus,
   166→  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
   167→} from '../models';
   168→
   169→export function usePoints() {
   170→  // Products from products store
   171→  const pointsProducts = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsProducts));
   172→  const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();
   173→
   174→  // Balance from extract store (pointsBalance)
   175→  const pointsBalance = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsBalance));
   176→
   177→  // Parameterization from parameter store
   178→  const parameterPointsProgram = useRootStore(
   179→    useShallow((state) => state.parameterPointsProgram)
   180→  );
   181→
   182→  const requestInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
   183→    await Promise.all([
   184→      getPointsBalance(),
   185→      getPointsProducts(),
   186→      getParameterPointsProgram(),
   187→    ]);
   188→  }, []);
   189→
   190→  const requestPointsBalance = useCallback(async () => {
   191→    await getPointsBalance();
   192→  }, []);
   193→
   194→  const requestPointsProducts = useCallback(async () => {
   195→    await getPointsProducts();
   196→  }, []);
   197→
   198→  const requestParameterization = useCallback(async () => {
   199→    await getParameterPointsProgram();
   200→  }, []);
   201→
   202→  const clear = useCallback(() => {
   203→    clearPointsProducts();
   204→  }, []);
   205→
   206→  return {
   207→    // Balance (from extract store - pointsBalance)
   208→    points: pointsBalance.points,
   209→    isLoadingBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING,
   210→    isErrorBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR,
   211→
   212→    // Products (from products store)
   213→    products: pointsProducts.products,
   214→    isLoadingProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.LOADING,
   215→    isErrorProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.ERROR,
   216→
   217→    // Parameterization (from parameter store)
   218→    pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity,
   219→    conversionFactor: parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor,
   220→    isLoadingParameterization:
   221→      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
   222→    isErrorParameterization:
   223→      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR,
   224→
   225→    // Actions
   226→    requestPointsBalance,
   227→    requestPointsProducts,
   228→    requestParameterization,
   229→    requestInitialData,
   230→    clear,
   231→  };
   232→}
   233→```
   234→
   235→### 2.2 Verify ParameterPointsProgramStatus exists
   236→File: src/services/models/parameter.model.ts
   237→
   238→Should have:
   239→```typescript
   240→export enum ParameterPointsProgramStatus {
   241→  IDLE = 'idle',
   242→  LOADING = 'loading',
   243→  SUCCESS = 'success',
   244→  ERROR = 'error',
   245→}
   246→```
   247→
   248→If missing, add it.
   249→
   250→--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   251→
   252→## Phase 3: Create useMarketplace Hook [CRITICAL] ✅ COMPLETED
   253→
   254→### 3.1 Create src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts ✅ DONE
   255→File created at src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts with all required functionality.
   256→
   257→```typescript
   258→import { useCallback } from 'react';
   259→import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
   260→import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
   261→import { getMarketplace, clearMarketplace } from '../services';
   262→import { MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';
   263→
   264→export function useMarketplace() {
   265→  const marketplace = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.marketplace));
   266→
   267→  const requestGetMarketplace = useCallback(
   268→    async (params: Record<string, string>) => {
   269→      await getMarketplace(params);
   270→    },
   271→    []
   272→  );
   273→
   274→  const clear = useCallback(() => {
   275→    clearMarketplace();
   276→  }, []);
   277→
   278→  return {
   279→    data: marketplace.data,
   280→    isLoading: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.LOADING,
   281→    isError: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.ERROR,
   282→    requestGetMarketplace,
   283→    clear,
   284→  };
   285→}
   286→```
   287→
   288→--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

   554→
   555→================================================================================
   556→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

file.content:
# Reward Program - Redux to Zustand Migration

Last Updated: 2026-01-26 22:55
Status: INCOMPLETE - SCREEN MIGRATION IN PROGRESS (4/6 screens migrated)

================================================================================
CRITICAL: PREVIOUS SESSION ERRORS TO AVOID
================================================================================

1. INFRASTRUCTURE WAS CREATED BUT SCREENS WERE NOT MIGRATED
   - Zustand stores exist but screens still use Redux connect()
   - useRescue hook was created but NEVER integrated into screens
   - This made the migration USELESS - data flows through Redux, not Zustand

2. TYPES WERE DUPLICATED UNNECESSARILY
   - PointsProduct already exists in services/models/products.model.ts
   - Do NOT add duplicate types - check if they exist first

3. BALANCE LOCATION WAS CONFUSED
   - Balance is in `pointsBalance` within extract.store.ts
   - NOT in parameter.store.ts
   - The getPointsBalance() service exists in extract.service.ts

4. PRODUCTION PATTERN WAS NOT FOLLOWED
   - Production (card-place) calls services DIRECTLY, not always through hooks
   - Example: getParameterPointsProgram() is called directly in Points screen

5. usePermission USES SuperApp's Redux (customerReducer.nrc)
   - This is NOT local Redux to migrate
   - Production also uses useSelector for this
   - Keep as-is until SuperApp migrates customer data to Zustand

================================================================================
CURRENT STATE (VERIFIED 2026-01-26)
================================================================================

## Zustand Infrastructure: COMPLETE

| Domain       | Store | API | Model | Repository | Service | Hook   |
|--------------|-------|-----|-------|------------|---------|--------|
| airlineMiles | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | -          | ✅      | ✅     |
| extract      | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | -      |
| parameter    | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | -      |
| permission   | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | ✅     |
| products     | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | ✅         | ✅      | -      |
| rescue       | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | -          | ✅      | ✅ (1) |
| marketplace  | ✅    | ✅  | ✅    | -          | ✅      | -      |

(1) useRescue exists but is NEVER USED by any screen

## Hooks Status:
- src/services/hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts - ✅ Used by AirlineMilesMarketplace
- src/services/hooks/usePermission.ts - ✅ Used by InvoiceCashbackSummary
- src/services/hooks/useRescue.ts - ❌ EXISTS BUT UNUSED
- src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts - ✅ USED by Points screen
- src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts - ✅ CREATED (Phase 3 completed)

## Screens Status:

| Screen                    | Uses Redux? | Uses Zustand? | Migration Status |
|---------------------------|-------------|---------------|------------------|
| AirlineMilesMarketplace   | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
| ExtractRewardProgram      | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
| LearnMoreRewardProgram    | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
| MyOrdersRewardProgram     | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
| Points                    | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
| PointsDetail              | No          | N/A           | ✅ DONE          |
| RewardProgramMarketplace  | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
| InvoiceCashbackOnboarding | No          | Yes           | ✅ DONE          |
| InvoiceCashbackPoints     | YES         | No            | ❌ PENDING       |
| InvoiceCashbackSummary    | YES         | Partial (4)   | ❌ PENDING       |

(2) Points uses usePoints hook (migrated 2026-01-26)
(3) PointsDetail - dead Redux code removed (2026-01-26)
(4) InvoiceCashbackSummary uses usePermission (Zustand) but rescueActions (Redux)

## Redux Files That MUST BE DELETED (after screen migration):

- src/redux/ducks/points.ts
- src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
- src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
- src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
- src/redux/reducers/index.ts
- src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts (only contains ParametrizationData type)

## Missing Types in Zustand Models:

- FilterOption - ✅ MIGRATED to services/models/products.model.ts (Phase 1 completed)

================================================================================
STATE MAPPING: Redux → Zustand
================================================================================

## pointsReducer (Redux) → Multiple Zustand stores

| Redux Field                    | Zustand Location                              | Service Function           |
|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------------------|
| points                         | pointsBalance.points (extract store)          | getPointsBalance()         |
| isLoadingBalance               | pointsBalance.status === LOADING              | -                          |
| isErrorBalance                 | pointsBalance.status === ERROR                | -                          |
| products                       | pointsProducts.products (products store)      | getPointsProducts()        |
| isLoadingProducts              | pointsProducts.status === LOADING             | -                          |
| isErrorProducts                | pointsProducts.status === ERROR               | -                          |
| pointsQuantity                 | parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity         | getParameterPointsProgram()|
| conversionFactor               | parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor       | -                          |
| isLoadingParameterization      | parameterPointsProgram.status === LOADING     | -                          |
| isErrorParameterization        | parameterPointsProgram.status === ERROR       | -                          |
| appliedTransactionsFilters     | pointsExtractFilters.appliedTransactionsFilters | -                        |
| appliedExpiringFilters         | pointsExtractFilters.appliedExpiringFilters   | -                          |

## rescueReducer (Redux) → rescue store (Zustand)

| Redux Field | Zustand Location            | Service Function |
|-------------|-----------------------------|------------------|
| isLoading   | rescue.status === LOADING   | performRescue()  |
| isError     | rescue.status === ERROR     | -                |
| status      | rescue.responseStatus       | -                |

## getMarketplaceReducer (Redux) → marketplace store (Zustand)

| Redux Field | Zustand Location              | Service Function  |
|-------------|-------------------------------|-------------------|
| isLoading   | marketplace.status === LOADING| getMarketplace()  |
| isError     | marketplace.status === ERROR  | -                 |
| data        | marketplace.data              | -                 |

================================================================================
TASKS TO COMPLETE MIGRATION
================================================================================

## Phase 1: Add Missing Type [QUICK FIX] ✅ COMPLETED

### 1.1 Add FilterOption to products.model.ts ✅ DONE
File: src/services/models/products.model.ts
FilterOption interface added at end of file.

### 1.2 Export FilterOption from models/index.ts ✅ DONE
File: src/services/models/index.ts
Already exported via wildcard: `export * from './products.model'`

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Phase 2: Create usePoints Hook [CRITICAL] ✅ COMPLETED

### 2.1 Create src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts ✅ DONE
File created at src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts with all required functionality.

### 2.2 Export from hooks/index.ts ✅ DONE
Added: `export * from './usePoints';`

This hook REPLACES all pointsReducer + PointsActions usage.

```typescript
import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import {
  getPointsProducts,
  clearPointsProducts,
  getPointsBalance,
  getParameterPointsProgram,
} from '../services';
import {
  PointsProductsStatus,
  PointsBalanceStatus,
  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
} from '../models';

export function usePoints() {
  // Products from products store
  const pointsProducts = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsProducts));
  const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  // Balance from extract store (pointsBalance)
  const pointsBalance = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsBalance));

  // Parameterization from parameter store
  const parameterPointsProgram = useRootStore(
    useShallow((state) => state.parameterPointsProgram)
  );

  const requestInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
    await Promise.all([
      getPointsBalance(),
      getPointsProducts(),
      getParameterPointsProgram(),
    ]);
  }, []);

  const requestPointsBalance = useCallback(async () => {
    await getPointsBalance();
  }, []);

  const requestPointsProducts = useCallback(async () => {
    await getPointsProducts();
  }, []);

  const requestParameterization = useCallback(async () => {
    await getParameterPointsProgram();
  }, []);

  const clear = useCallback(() => {
    clearPointsProducts();
  }, []);

  return {
    // Balance (from extract store - pointsBalance)
    points: pointsBalance.points,
    isLoadingBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING,
    isErrorBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR,

    // Products (from products store)
    products: pointsProducts.products,
    isLoadingProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.LOADING,
    isErrorProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.ERROR,

    // Parameterization (from parameter store)
    pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity,
    conversionFactor: parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor,
    isLoadingParameterization:
      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
    isErrorParameterization:
      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR,

    // Actions
    requestPointsBalance,
    requestPointsProducts,
    requestParameterization,
    requestInitialData,
    clear,
  };
}
```

### 2.2 Verify ParameterPointsProgramStatus exists
File: src/services/models/parameter.model.ts

Should have:
```typescript
export enum ParameterPointsProgramStatus {
  IDLE = 'idle',
  LOADING = 'loading',
  SUCCESS = 'success',
  ERROR = 'error',
}
```

If missing, add it.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Phase 3: Create useMarketplace Hook [CRITICAL] ✅ COMPLETED

### 3.1 Create src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts ✅ DONE
File created at src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts with all required functionality.

```typescript
import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { getMarketplace, clearMarketplace } from '../services';
import { MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';

export function useMarketplace() {
  const marketplace = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.marketplace));

  const requestGetMarketplace = useCallback(
    async (params: Record<string, string>) => {
      await getMarketplace(params);
    },
    []
  );

  const clear = useCallback(() => {
    clearMarketplace();
  }, []);

  return {
    data: marketplace.data,
    isLoading: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.LOADING,
    isError: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.ERROR,
    requestGetMarketplace,
    clear,
  };
}
```

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Phase 4: Update hooks/index.ts Exports ✅ COMPLETED

### 4.1 Add new hook exports ✅ DONE
File: src/services/hooks/index.ts
Added: `export * from './useMarketplace';` (usePoints was already exported)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Phase 5: Migrate Screens [CRITICAL - MAIN TASK]

### 5.1 Points Screen ✅ COMPLETED (2026-01-26)

COMPLETED:
- Removed all Redux imports (connect, bindActionCreators, Dispatch, PointsActions, AppReducers)

### 5.3 RewardProgramMarketplace Screen ✅ COMPLETED (2026-01-26)
File: src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/index.tsx

COMPLETED:

- Updated Models/index.ts to use NativeStackScreenProps without Redux dependencies

- Direct export: `export default RewardProgramMarketplaceWebView`

### 5.4 InvoiceCashbackOnboarding Screen ✅ COMPLETED (2026-01-26)
File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx

COMPLETED:
- Removed all Redux imports (connect, bindActionCreators, Dispatch, PointsActions, AppReducers)
- Removed mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps functions

- Replaced pointsReducer.X with hook values (points, pointsQuantity, isLoadingBalance, etc.)
- Updated Models/index.ts to use NativeStackScreenProps without Redux dependencies

### 5.5 InvoiceCashbackPoints Screen [IN PROGRESS]
File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx

REMOVE:
- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
- mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps, connect()

ADD:

REPLACE:
```typescript
const InvoiceCashbackPoints: FC<Props> = ({ route, navigation }) => {
  const {
    points,
    pointsQuantity,
    isLoadingParameterization,
    requestParameterization,
  } = usePoints();

  // Replace pointsReducer.X with hook values
```

### 5.6 InvoiceCashbackSummary Screen
File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx

REMOVE:
- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
- import { rescueActions, RescuePayload } from '../../redux/ducks/rescue';
- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
- mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps, connect()

ADD:

- import type { RescuePayload } from '../../services';

REPLACE:
```typescript
const InvoiceCashbackSummary: FC<Props> = ({ route }) => {
  const { conversionFactor } = usePoints();
  const {
    isLoading: isRescueLoading,
    isError: isRescueFailed,
    status: rescueStatus,
    rescueRequest,
    reset: rescueClear,
  } = useRescue();

  // Note: isRescueConcluded logic needs adjustment:
  // OLD: !isRescueFailed && !!rescueReducer?.status
  // NEW: !isRescueFailed && !!rescueStatus

  // Replace rescueRequest({ payload }) with rescueRequest(payload)

```

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Phase 6: Update Dependent Files

## Phase 8: Verification

npm run typecheck
```
Expected: Zero errors in migrated files

### 8.2 Knip validation

npm run knip
```
Expected:
- No unused exports in services/hooks/

### 8.3 Grep validation
```bash
grep -r "from 'react-redux'" src/screens/

grep -r "connect(" src/screens/
```
Expected: No matches (except usePermission which uses SuperApp's Redux)

### 8.4 Functional testing
- [ ] Points screen loads and displays products
- [ ] Points screen shows balance
- [ ] PointsDetail screen works (navigation only)
- [ ] RewardProgramMarketplace loads redirect URL
- [ ] InvoiceCashbackOnboarding displays conversion info
- [ ] InvoiceCashbackPoints allows point input

================================================================================
NOTES
================================================================================

1. usePermission hook uses useSelector for SuperApp's customerReducer.nrc
   - This is NOT local Redux - it's SuperApp's state
   - Production (card-place) also uses this pattern
   - Keep as-is until SuperApp migrates customer to Zustand

2. getParameterPointsProgram() is called directly in some screens

4. Screen Models/index.ts files may need updates

   153→
   154→        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />
   155→
   156→        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
   157→      </BackDropBottom>
   158→    </BasicScreen>
   159→  );
   160→};
   161→
   162→export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  InputBox,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import {
  formatCurrencyBR,
  getFormattedPoints,
  getParsedCurrency,
  getParsePoints,
} from '../../utils/functions';
import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';

const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  handleContinue,
  points,
  formattedPrice,
  handleChangeReais,
  handleChangePoints,
  handleUseAll,
  pointsValue,
  reaisValue,
  convertionValue,
  pointsError,
  reaisError,
  items,
  pointsQuantity,
  handleModalizeContinue,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  handleSelectEvent,
  height,
  width,
  isLoadingParameterization,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title="Cashback na fatura"
      hasRightIcon
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
        <Text
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
          type="headingMDL"
          mt="smaller"
        >
          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
        </Text>

        <Box direction="row" mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
            Pontos disponíveis:
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em pontos"
          placeholder="0"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="number-pad"
          value={pointsValue}
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
          error={pointsError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
          textRight="Usar todos"
          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
        />

        <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
          <Icon
            name="icon-switch-vertical"
            size="xxs"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
            mr="nano"
            ml="nano"
          />
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em reais"
          placeholder="R$0,00"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
          value={reaisValue}
          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
          error={reaisError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
        />
        {isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
          </Box>
        )}
        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Text type="paragraphMD">
              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de
              cashback na fatura.
            </Text>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
        <Button
          disabled={
            pointsValue === '' ||
            reaisValue === '' ||
            pointsValue === '0' ||
            reaisValue === '0' ||
            pointsError ||
            reaisError
          }
          text="Continuar"
          mt="large"
          mb="small"
          onPress={() => {
            const ptsSel = getParsePoints(pointsValue);
            const reaisSel = getParsedCurrency(reaisValue);
            handleContinue({ pointsSelected: ptsSel, reaisSelected: reaisSel });
          }}
          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
        />
      </Box>
      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;
